Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

input.initialPrompt: Build this project in both Debug and Release configurations and create a binlog for each build.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command: cd /tmp/sv-a1e8d2c5a4b2441eae9ac953c9668ace && dotnet build -c Debug /bl:Debug.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---DEBUG DONE---" && dotnet build -c Release /bl:Release.binlog 2>&1 && echo "---RELEASE DONE---"
arguments.description: Build in Debug and Release with binlogs

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Build in Debug and Release with binlogs

data.content:
Both builds succeeded with 0 warnings and 0 errors. The binlogs are created:

- **`Debug.binlog`** — Debug configuration build
- **`Release.binlog`** — Release configuration build

You can analyze them with `dotnet build` replay (`dotnet msbuild -flp:logfile=out.log Debug.binlog`) or open them in the [MSBuild Structured Log Viewer](https://msbuildlog.com/).
